final_text:
The claim matches a vault span exactly. The "Qualified commercial pipeline" entity (regional docs) shows Q2 2026 actual = 13.053 (million EUR) = 13,053,000, with no conflicts in its own index. The separately-named "Qualified pipeline" (finance docs, 13.510) is a different entity label — plausibly a broader total pipeline rather than a competing value for the same "commercial" metric, and no document states they are the same figure.
